verses.text: Topa, ka Pasian aw, sunin huhna kong ngen a, zan hun sungin nangma mai-ah kong kiko hi
Ka thungetna hong za in la, nong huh ding ka hong ngetna hong ngai in
Bang hang hiam cih leh lungkhamna tampi thuakin, ka si dektak hi
Kei pen a sidek mi tawh ka kibang ta a, ka thahatna khempeuh beimang khinta hi
Misite lakah a kinusia, a kithatlum, han sunga lum, na huh zawh ahi nawnlo, na phawk nawnlohte ka bang ta hi
Kei pen, mialin a thukna mun, Leihawm thuk sungah nong koih khinta hi
Nangma hehna keima tungah gik mahmah a, na tuihualte khempeuh tawh kei na hong vukcip hi
Ka kikholhpih mite in kei a hong pelh dingin na hong bawl a, amaute tungah a cikzethuai khatin kei na hong bawl hi. Ka suahtak theihlohna dingin kei hong kikhumcip a
ka gim thuakna hangin ka mit a mial ta hi. Topa aw, nisimin nangma tungah kong ngen a, thu ngenin ka khutte nangma lamah kong zan hi
A sisate-a' dingin na lamdang a bawl na hi hiam? Nangmah a phat dingin mi a si khinsate hong tho ding ahi hiam
Han sungah na itna kip kigen ding a, siatna munah nangma thumannate kigen ding ahi hiam
Khuamialna sungah na na lamdangte kithei a, mangngilhna gamsungah na hotkhiat huhna kithei ahi hiam
Ahih hangin Topa aw, na tungah huhna kong ngen a, zingsang simin na mai-ah thu ka hong ngen hi
Topa aw, bang hangin kei hong paiikhia na hi hiam? Bang hangin kei kiang panin na maitang seel na hi hiam
Ka neu tunga kipan gim thuakin ka si dektak hi. Nong gimpiakte ka thuak a, ka cihna ding mel ka thei nawn kei hi
Nangma hehna in keimah hong nawkgawp khin a, a lauhuai mahmah nangma hong sukgawpna in kei hong susia ta hi
Amaute in tuikhang bangin sun tawntungin kei hong umcih uh a, kei hong tuamcip uh hi
Kei hong itte leh ka lawmte keimah nong pelhsak khin a, khuamial bekbek, keima kikholhpih ahi hi.
